achievements: Stripe checkout hardened (PR #14): idempotency key, client_reference_id, pinned apiVersion 2026-02-25.clover in upload-complete, create-professional-checkout, create-checkout-session
Resume flow persistence hardened: token-first applicant matching, email fallback, autosave serialized client+server, identity fields persisted, GET returns applicantId, case-insensitive flag parsing
42/42 tests passing on npm run test
Checkout resilience: 3-attempt exp backoff, Retry-After handling, typed error codes, inline error banner, token survives retries
Stripe dry-run mode (CHECKOUT_DRY_RUN) validates keys without charging
OpenWolf memory tracked: .wolf/ directory committed, runtime artifacts untracked
Professional membership overview doc expanded (+144 lines)
DWD impersonation re-pointed to it-admin; Drive/Stripe probe scripts added
improvements: Pre-existing type errors in npm run check unaddressed — isolate, fix, add to CI gate

professional/apply.astro 20726 tok monolith — extract wizard steps, upload UI, validation into components
upload-sheet.ts 7879 tok — split form-data writers from Drive file ops, document 47-column contract
google-docs.ts 6274 tok — split createApplicationReviewDoc from createAssociateApplicationReviewDoc into per-membership modules
drive-files.ts + upload-sheet.ts duplicate Drive row logic — consolidate Drive file write/read paths
Replace 121KB HAR file in repo root with .gitignore entry (already added but file still tracked?)
Add Vitest coverage for checkout resilience path (retry/backoff/Retry-After) — gap likely
Add structured error code enum shared between client (apply.astro) and server endpoints to prevent stringly-typed drift
next_tasks: Run ce-code-review on review/snapshot branch — last pass 0 findings on auto-generated metadata only, but real Stripe hardening landed after

Run designqc on /professional/apply and /renew/associate (renew checkout pages already have local QA report from 2026-06-09)
Tighten .gitignore: ensure subscribe.eldaa.org.nz.har, .DS_Store, .data/applicants.json not tracked; run git rm --cached

Backfill buglog.json with Stripe hardening work — currently likely missing
Add post-deploy verification: run .run/smoke-upload-staging.mjs against production webhook after cutover
Schedule cron to replay stalled resume-link sends (resend-link.ts exists but no scheduler wired)
risks: Staging vs production webhook URL divergence (eldaa.fly.dev vs subscribe.eldaa.org.nz) — easy to misconfigure, past payment hit wrong URL per CLAUDE.md note
Stripe apiVersion pin to 2026-02-25.clover — 4 months stale by current date 2026-06-22, plan upgrade before Stripe deprecates
47-column Google Sheet schema (A–AU) is the API contract — adding columns breaks existing rows, removing breaks token-based resume
Soft-delete on Drive Files sheet keeps deleted=TRUE rows forever — no retention policy, sheet will grow unbounded
Autosave queue per-applicant in-memory in apply.ts — lost on server restart, applicants mid-edit lose unsaved work
Email sender has hoisted mocks pattern (email-sender.test.ts) — fragile, easy to break on refactor
DWD impersonation as it-admin@eldaa.org.nz — broad privilege, single point of failure for all Drive access
121KB HAR file in repo root may leak session tokens if it captured auth headers — must verify untracked/redacted
resume_token stored in sheet column AG — if sheet access compromised, tokens leak; no expiry, no rotation
npm run check has pre-existing type errors ignored — drift accumulates, real bugs hide in noise
Two parallel checkout paths: upload-complete (new) + create-checkout-session (legacy) + create-professional-checkout (legacy) — risk of divergent behavior, single source of truth missing
renew/associate.astro + renew/pro.astro marked DEPRECATED but still in repo — confused applicants may hit dead flow
